name: The Coca-Cola Company
description: The Coca-Cola Company is a world-leading total beverage company with a portfolio spanning over 200 brands, including sparkling soft drinks, waters, juices, and plant-based beverages. Founded in 1892 and headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, the company operates in more than 200 countries and territories. Its mission is to refresh the world and make a difference through sustainable business practices and iconic brands like Coca-Cola, Sprite, and Fanta. As a global powerhouse, it remains one of the most recognized and influential corporations, continuously innovating to meet evolving consumer preferences across the globe.
